title: Fix manual add players on Host Session Dashboard

requirements.text: Fix the manual add player feature on the Host Session Dashboard so that hosts can successfully add guest players (by name only, without an account) to an active session.

quotes: Still not working on the Host dashboard

acceptanceCriteria: Host can enter a guest player name in the manual add field on the Host Session Dashboard and submit it without errors.
The added guest player appears in the session player list immediately after being added.
Guest players added manually display with Ghost icon and amber styling consistent with the rest of the app.
No error toast or console error appears when adding a guest player.

requirements.text: Fix the manual add player feature on the Host Session Dashboard so that hosts can successfully add registered (authenticated) players by searching and selecting their profile.

quotes: Still not working on the Host dashboard

acceptanceCriteria: Host can search for a registered player by name or principal on the Host Session Dashboard and add them to the session.
The added registered player appears in the session player list immediately after being added.
No error toast or console error appears when adding a registered player.
The backend correctly associates the registered player's principal with the session.

constraints: Do not change the overall Host Session Dashboard layout or other existing functionality.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui/ (immutable paths).
nonGoals: Adding new player management features beyond fixing the existing manual add flow.
Changes to the player join flow (JoinSession page).
Changes to the scheduling or round management logic.
